purpose: Premium Eid gifting and table spread featuring dates boxes, traditional sweets, and wrapped gifts arranged in a celebratory Saudi Eid aesthetic.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Eid Al-Fitr or Eid Al-Adha celebratory table spread photography, premium dates box with Medjool dates arranged on traditional Arabic tray, assorted ma'amoul and kaak cookies, wrapped gifts with gold ribbon, fragrant rose petals scattered, traditional Najdi wooden trays and brass bowls, {featured_product} as hero item, warm golden ambient lighting suggesting celebration, soft overhead angle or 45-degree, no people, rich jewel-toned background of deep green or burgundy, hyper-realistic food and gift detail, shot on 35mm at f/5.6, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: all. Source code in research corpus: F04. Saudi adaptation guidance: Eid gifting is a core Saudi retail and F&B occasion. Deep green and gold are primary Eid color signals in Saudi market. Dates are non-negotiable hero item. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 3-5 posts across Eid window. Compliance level: elevated.
